heading: Delays for which no responsibility is assumed
label: 3774 Delays for which no responsibility is assumed
notes: Amendments1985—Par. (6). amended par. (6) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (6) read as follows: “time necessary for investigation of marine accidents; or”.Pub. L. 99–209

Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to any claim arising on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–209section 7(b)(1) of Pub. L. 99–209section 3771 of this titleDec. 23, 1985
amendments: Amendments1985—Par. (6). amended par. (6) generally. Prior to amendment, par. (6) read as follows: “time necessary for investigation of marine accidents; or”.Pub. L. 99–209

Effective Date of 1985 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to any claim arising on or after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 99–209section 7(b)(1) of Pub. L. 99–209section 3771 of this titleDec. 23, 1985

children.text: necessary construction or maintenance work on Canal locks, terminals, or equipment;

investigation of a marine accident that is conducted within 24 hours after the accident occurs, except that any liability of the Commission beyond that 24-hour period shall be limited to the extent to which the accident was caused, or contributed to, by the negligence of an employee of the Commission acting within the scope of the employee’s official duties; or
except as specially set forth in this subpart, any other cause.
